uk.label: Good example of inflation coming under control. UK CPI is above target but heading in the right direction.

us.label: Good example of inflation on target. US CPI is sitting right where the central bank wants it.

eurozone.label: Good example of inflation on target. Eurozone CPI is sitting right where the central bank wants it.

china.label: Good example of inflation running slightly cool. China CPI is just below target.

japan.label: Good example of inflation on target. Japan CPI is sitting right where the central bank wants it.

brazil.label: Good example of inflation coming under control. Brazil CPI is above target but heading in the right direction.

uk.label: Good example of elevated unemployment. UK is above its structural rate but improving.

us.label: Good example of a tight labour market. US unemployment is at or below its normal level.

eurozone.label: Good example of a tight labour market. Eurozone unemployment is at or below its normal level.

china.label: Good example of a tight labour market. China unemployment is at or below its normal level.

japan.label: Good example of a tight labour market. Japan unemployment is at or below its normal level.

brazil.label: Good example of a tight labour market. Brazil unemployment is at or below its normal level.

uk.label: Good example of healthy growth. UK is expanding at or above its trend rate.

us.label: Good example of healthy growth. US is expanding at or above its trend rate.

eurozone.label: Good example of healthy growth. Eurozone is expanding at or above its trend rate.

china.label: Good example of healthy growth. China is expanding at or above its trend rate.

japan.label: Good example of healthy growth. Japan is expanding at or above its trend rate.

brazil.label: Good example of healthy growth. Brazil is expanding at or above its trend rate.

uk.label: Good example of a central bank on hold. UK is watching the data before moving rates.

us.label: Good example of a central bank on hold. US is watching the data before moving rates.

eurozone.label: Good example of a central bank on hold. Eurozone is watching the data before moving rates.

china.label: Good example of a central bank on hold. China is watching the data before moving rates.

japan.label: Good example of a central bank on hold. Japan is watching the data before moving rates.

brazil.label: Good example of restrictive monetary policy. Brazil rates are high and squeezing the economy.

uk.label: Good example of a stable exchange rate. the UK currency is holding steady against the dollar.

us.label: Good example of a stable exchange rate. the US currency is holding steady against the dollar.

eurozone.label: Good example of a stable exchange rate. the Eurozone currency is holding steady against the dollar.

china.label: Good example of a stable exchange rate. the China currency is holding steady against the dollar.

japan.label: Good example of a stable exchange rate. the Japan currency is holding steady against the dollar.

brazil.label: Good example of a stable exchange rate. the Brazil currency is holding steady against the dollar.

uk.label: Good example of a current account deficit. UK is buying more from the world than it is selling.

us.label: Good example of a current account deficit. US is buying more from the world than it is selling.

eurozone.label: Good example of a large current account surplus. Eurozone is selling significantly more to the world than it is buying.

china.label: Good example of a current account surplus. China is selling more to the world than it is buying.

japan.label: Good example of a large current account surplus. Japan is selling significantly more to the world than it is buying.

brazil.label: Good example of a current account deficit. Brazil is buying more from the world than it is selling.
